events.summary: OpenAI helped found the Appia Foundation (hosted by the Linux Foundation) to build open, modular conformity specs for advanced-AI standards — a third-party 'trust layer' play.
DeepMind + UK government unveil an AI-accelerated planning prototype aimed at faster house-building decisions.
DeepMind publishes an 'AI Control Roadmap' for securing AI agents, blending traditional safeguards with real-time monitoring.
[Headline only] US government reportedly issued an export-control directive suspending all access to Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models. Full text not yet read.
DeepMind and partners open a $10M funding call for multi-agent AI safety research.
